scope: Internal coordinator view: real mentor + student identities with contact info.
fit_basis: fit = 0.6*mean + 0.4*min of the 3 measured criteria (1-10); style_fit excluded (no style data was collected)

matches.rationale: Ananth Subramanya's expertise in AI & Emerging Tech and Entrepreneurship/Venture Creation aligns with Samuel Avramov's top choice of the Venture Pathway, where he wants a guided approach to confirming whether his technical concepts are valid ventures. Samuel has experience with AI, knowledge graphs, and developer infrastructure projects and needs help developing passion projects to the next stage. Ananth's entrepreneurship background can provide the guidance Samuel seeks for moving from exploratory phases to MVPs.

Isha's top choice is the Venture Pathway with a strong interest in building a startup from the ground up, identifying real problems, and developing solutions people will pay for. Nicki's expertise spans Entrepreneurship/Venture Creation, Product Development/Design, and Go-to-market strategy including ICP and story, which directly aligns with Isha's goals of creating impactful, real-world products and understanding how to bring them to market.

Aarav is interested in the Venture Pathway and Events, which align with his current ventures. Christopher's expertise includes Entrepreneurship/Venture Creation, Innovation Processes, and AI & Emerging Tech, providing relevant guidance for Aarav's ongoing venture work and event participation.

Christopher's Career Advice & Professional Growth background can support Viacheslav's diverse skill set spanning research, customer discovery, and operations/project management. This pairing provides comprehensive mentorship across the multiple domains Viacheslav is exploring.

Tim's expertise in Entrepreneurship/Venture Creation, Product Development/Design, and Innovation Processes aligns perfectly with Abdul's goal of implementing his idea and benefiting from resources to help with product development.

Adit's idea specifically involves AR glasses or headsets for real-time visual overlays, making Max's Virtual Environments/XR expertise directly relevant. Max can provide guidance on the visual technology Adit needs and support his interest in the Venture Pathway for developing business-building skills.

Christian can help Nathanael leverage lab resources to further build upon his startup ideas.
